description: Displays native WPF text that inherits the surrounding theme foreground unless an explicit foreground is provided.

fontWeight.description: WPF font weight used to emphasize the text.

textWrapping.description: Wrapping behavior when text exceeds the available width.

textAlignment.description: Horizontal alignment of text lines within the control.

margin.description: Outer WPF Thickness separating the text from adjacent content.

foreground.description: Optional brush value or resource expression; omit to inherit the surrounding foreground.
